Dialog.name: MND_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I came here many times for nutritious meals.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I feel like my {f 0 1 34}Academics{f 0 1 27} increased[n]due to the omega-3s in the food.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The scent of broiled fish is tickling my nose...[n]{f 1 1}
